ns0:entry.ns0:title: 666ghj/BettaFish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/666ghj/BettaFish
Language: python
微舆：人人可用的多Agent舆情分析助手，打破信息茧房，还原舆情原貌，预测未来走向，辅助决策！从0实现，不依赖任何框架。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: 666ghj/MiroFish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish
Language: python
A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LMCache/LMCache
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LMCache/LMCache
Language: python
Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
Language: python
The agent that grows with you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen-Agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen-Agent
Language: python
Agent framework and applications built upon Qwen>=3.0, featuring Function Calling, MCP, Code Interpreter, RAG, Chrome extension, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope
Language: python
Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/OpenSandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/OpenSandbox
Language: python
OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezarezvani/claude-skills
Language: python
169 production-ready skills & plugins for Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and OpenClaw — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, and more. Install via /plugin marketplace.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills and subagents, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
Language: python
A curated list of awesome skills, hooks, slash-commands, agent orchestrators, applications, and plugins for Claude Code by Anthropic

ns0:entry.ns0:title: inclusionAI/AReaL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/inclusionAI/AReaL
Language: python
Lightning-Fast RL for LLM Reasoning and Agents. Made Simple & Flexible.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: khoj-ai/khoj
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/khoj-ai/khoj
Language: python
Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: teng-lin/notebooklm-py
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/teng-lin/notebooklm-py
Language: python
Unofficial Python API for Google NotebookLM
